headline: MGE (MGEE) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
summary: MGE (MGEE) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +16.81% and +6.89%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Eversource Energy to Release Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: ES' heads into first-quarter earnings results with smart meter installs, transmission investments and disciplined costs in focus, though higher interest expenses may have affected gains.

headline: Eversource (ES) Q1 Earnings on the Horizon: Analysts' Insights on Key Performance Measures
summary: Besides Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates for Eversource (ES), review projections for some of its key metrics to gain a deeper understanding of how the company might have fared during the quarter ended March 2026.
